column1: # Gem recipes (RL-50). One recipe per craftable gem-item.
# Each row: an output item (a GEM-category item type in items.csv) plus 2-4
# ingredient SLOTS. Combining gems that satisfy every slot at a gem hearth
# produces one of the output item.
# Every slot cell names a SPECIFIC GemSpecies - there are no wildcard
# ("any" / "exotic" / "metal_exotic") slots. Duplicates mean "N of that gem".
# Empty slot cells mean the recipe has fewer than 4 ingredients.
# Cost curve by rarity (gates output power against the gem economy:
# ~23 hamethyst / ~8 metal / ~5 exotic per game). HAMETHYST spawns on every
# level; metals and exotics ONLY on their affinity theme
#   r5  named exotic + named metal + HAMETHYST
#   r6  named rare pair + HAMETHYST x2
#   r7  two exotics + a metal + HAMETHYST
# Rare pairs are same-theme where possible (CONCRETE: SILVER+MALACHOR
# --- Jade Peach: a revive charm crafted from an exotic gem (output is an

column2: not a GEM-scroll - the forge drops it like any other recipe output).
